phrases.intent_en: What time does the next tour start?
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure commence la prochaine visite ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UR koh-MONCE lah pro-SHEN vee-ZEET
phrases.cultural_note: Mumm runs regular cellar tours throughout the day. The Cordon Rouge is their flagship cuvée — recognisable by the red sash on the bottle.

phrases.intent_en: I would like to taste the Cordon Rouge.
phrases.text_local: Je voudrais goûter le Cordon Rouge.
phrases.pronunciation: zhuh voo-DRAY goo-TAY luh kor-DON ROOZH
phrases.cultural_note: Cordon Rouge is Mumm's iconic non-vintage champagne. Named for the red ribbon (cordon rouge) of the Légion d'honneur.

phrases.intent_en: Can I reserve a tasting for this afternoon
phrases.text_local: Puis-je réserver une dégustation pour cet après-midi ?
phrases.pronunciation: pwee-zhuh ray-zur-VAY oon day-goos-tah-SYON poor set ah-pray-mee-DEE
phrases.cultural_note: G.H. Mumm's cellars contain 25 km of chalk tunnels holding millions of bottles — tours run throughout the day.

responses.english: Yes, there are spots at 4 pm.
responses.phonetic: wee, eel rest day PLAHS ah SEZ UR.
responses.local: Oui, il reste des places à seize heures.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which Mumm cuvée is the most classic to taste
phrases.text_local: Quelle cuvée Mumm est la plus classique à déguster ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel koo-VAY moom ay lah ploo klah-SEEK ah day-goos-TAY

responses.english: The Cordon Rouge, our flagship cuvée.
responses.phonetic: luh kor-DON ROOZH, notr koo-VAY ahm-blay-mah-TEEK.
responses.local: Le Cordon Rouge, notre cuvée emblématique.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if bottles can be shipped internationally
phrases.text_local: Peut-on expédier des bouteilles à l'étranger ?
phrases.pronunciation: puh-TON eks-pay-DYAY day boo-TAY ah lay-trahn-ZHAY
